feed.title: kingasix TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from kingasix

entry.title: Didn’t expect the dragon to tear off his armor like Frieza going into his next form. I think we’ve made them mad. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #gaming #retrogaming
entry.content: Didn’t expect the dragon to tear off his armor like Frieza going into his next form. I think we’ve made them mad. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #gaming #retrogaming

entry.title: The Sky Temple was a really fun time and with that we’ve completed the Twilight Mirror. We finally approach the endgame! #asixverse #zelda #blerd #gaming #retrogaming
entry.content: The Sky Temple was a really fun time and with that we’ve completed the Twilight Mirror. We finally approach the endgame! #asixverse #zelda #blerd #gaming #retrogaming

entry.title: This was a fun little minigame. I would enjoyed more it. Didn’t really need a bigger quiver but I’ll take it. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: This was a fun little minigame. I would enjoyed more it. Didn’t really need a bigger quiver but I’ll take it. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Link has many fans but we all know who the best fan really is. Will probably be one of the last time we see our Castle Town pups 😔 #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Link has many fans but we all know who the best fan really is. Will probably be one of the last time we see our Castle Town pups 😔 #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: What a reveal! Who would’ve thought that Midna was the titular Twilight Princess!? Roll credits! (Also titular is a funny word for obvious reasons) #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: What a reveal! Who would’ve thought that Midna was the titular Twilight Princess!? Roll credits! (Also titular is a funny word for obvious reasons) #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Shout out to this PC port (Dusklight) and the fast spinner option. Letting it rip is much more fun then it has any right to be. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Shout out to this PC port (Dusklight) and the fast spinner option. Letting it rip is much more fun then it has any right to be. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: I thought Zant was about to pull some super duper magic and all he did was summon foddder. Come on bruh… #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: I thought Zant was about to pull some super duper magic and all he did was summon foddder. Come on bruh… #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: I didn’t want to hurt his fingies but they were gripping the heck outta that orb. Had to cut the fingies. 🤷🏾‍♂️ #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: I didn’t want to hurt his fingies but they were gripping the heck outta that orb. Had to cut the fingies. 🤷🏾‍♂️ #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: And this is why I don’t mind checking chest every now and again. It’s always fun finding a piece of heart and completing the set. ❤️ #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: And this is why I don’t mind checking chest every now and again. It’s always fun finding a piece of heart and completing the set. ❤️ #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: I know Im running all up and through their spot but is jumping me really the way to go about this. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: I know Im running all up and through their spot but is jumping me really the way to go about this. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Zant always coming out with some wack parlor trick. I think Link was just playing along so be didn’t feel so bad. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Zant always coming out with some wack parlor trick. I think Link was just playing along so be didn’t feel so bad. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Zant tried to summon the gang but they are nothing more fodder to my Master Sword. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Zant tried to summon the gang but they are nothing more fodder to my Master Sword. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: This was a pleasant surprise. Wasn’t expecting the Master Sword to get a little upgrade. Guess I got the Super Master Sword! #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: This was a pleasant surprise. Wasn’t expecting the Master Sword to get a little upgrade. Guess I got the Super Master Sword! #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: They just threw the entire squad at me and I sent them lambs to the slaughter! Can’t stop Hyrule’s finest! 😤 #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: They just threw the entire squad at me and I sent them lambs to the slaughter! Can’t stop Hyrule’s finest! 😤 #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: I don’t understand Zant’s shadow math but I don’t need to! I am just here to save the world and kick butt!!! #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: I don’t understand Zant’s shadow math but I don’t need to! I am just here to save the world and kick butt!!! #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Zant wasn’t ready for the fast boots! All he could do was teleport and throw his tantrum. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Zant wasn’t ready for the fast boots! All he could do was teleport and throw his tantrum. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Ya know… I realize that this entire fight is just Zant throwing a tantrum and Link doing Tom & Jerry high jinks… #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Ya know… I realize that this entire fight is just Zant throwing a tantrum and Link doing Tom & Jerry high jinks… #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Zant just went full insanity but that isn’t enough to stop Mr. Keyah himself! Albeit being short, I enjoyed the Twilight Realm and the boss fight! #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Zant just went full insanity but that isn’t enough to stop Mr. Keyah himself! Albeit being short, I enjoyed the Twilight Realm and the boss fight! #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: I can’t believe it was Ganon this whole time. I am befuddled… but apparently Midna has had enough with Zant’s BS. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: I can’t believe it was Ganon this whole time. I am befuddled… but apparently Midna has had enough with Zant’s BS. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Decided to run around Hyrule and get some extra hearts wherever I could find them. Always fun when I come across one. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Decided to run around Hyrule and get some extra hearts wherever I could find them. Always fun when I come across one. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Traveling around Hyrule for some rupees when all of a sudden I am attacked by a murder of crows… But they gave me rupees so I guess you can say two birds, many rupees. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Traveling around Hyrule for some rupees when all of a sudden I am attacked by a murder of crows… But they gave me rupees so I guess you can say two birds, many rupees. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: I know we should be on the way to take back Hyrule Castle but I had to go hit the slopes with my yeti and them. We some real snowboard kids frfr. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: I know we should be on the way to take back Hyrule Castle but I had to go hit the slopes with my yeti and them. We some real snowboard kids frfr. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: I wish my game audio was a bit louder because they are getting down at the Malo Mart. We was jiggin’ while I purchased my magic armor. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: I wish my game audio was a bit louder because they are getting down at the Malo Mart. We was jiggin’ while I purchased my magic armor. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: I think Midna might be a digimon the way she just transformed into this thingamajig. Link would be a digimon-destined. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: I think Midna might be a digimon the way she just transformed into this thingamajig. Link would be a digimon-destined. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Looks like King Bulblin wants to run the ones one last time and I must oblige. I’ll teach this old man this lesson as many times as he wants. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Looks like King Bulblin wants to run the ones one last time and I must oblige. I’ll teach this old man this lesson as many times as he wants. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: It took about three or four times but King Bulblin finally realized who’s the dude around Hyrule. He cool people though… He’ll be alright. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: It took about three or four times but King Bulblin finally realized who’s the dude around Hyrule. He cool people though… He’ll be alright. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: All jokes aside, its fun busting these Darknuts. I wish my hidden skills would come in handy more but that might be a skill issue. Still had a fun time. 🤷🏾‍♂️ #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: All jokes aside, its fun busting these Darknuts. I wish my hidden skills would come in handy more but that might be a skill issue. Still had a fun time. 🤷🏾‍♂️ #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Apologies for the lack of updates on Whole Fool & the Party Network. I’ve been making more time for it lately so hopefully you’ll be seeing more of it. Don’t be afraid to ask me anything about the project or myself. Thank you and have a foolishly jovial t
entry.content: Apologies for the lack of updates on Whole Fool & the Party Network. I’ve been making more time for it lately so hopefully you’ll be seeing more of it. Don’t be afraid to ask me anything about the project or myself. Thank you and have a foolishly jovial t

entry.title: We did not need to do a cutscene camera pan to these grunt lizards… Tryna hype them up n ish. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #retrogaming
entry.content: We did not need to do a cutscene camera pan to these grunt lizards… Tryna hype them up n ish. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #retrogaming

entry.title: Nintendo really wants me to bust two Darknuts back to back at the same time… And i just got finished busting a Darknut 😩 #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Nintendo really wants me to bust two Darknuts back to back at the same time… And i just got finished busting a Darknut 😩 #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio
entry.content: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio

entry.title: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights
entry.content: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights

entry.title: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
entry.content: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
